summary: Completed full E2E testing of Parcela landing page (Express backend + CRA frontend). Backend: 11/11 pytest tests pass (health, valid waitlist for all 4 languages, invalid email/language/missing-fields => 400, idempotent upsert by email, unknown /api 404, MongoDB persistence verified). Frontend: default 'rw' language confirmed via localStorage + Kinyarwanda hero badge, 3 problem cards visible, promise section visible, language switcher cycles RW/EN/FR/SW with content updates and persistence across reload, waitlist form shows success on valid email and invalid message on bad email, Instagram + TikTok @parcela.rw links correct, no 'Made with Emergent' badge present.
critical_code_review_comments: server.js: no rate-limiting on /api/waitlist — easy abuse vector for an open public endpoint. Consider express-rate-limit.
server.js: Mongo connection is lazily initialised and not gracefully closed on shutdown; not blocking but worth a SIGTERM handler.

server.js: catch-all `app.use('/api', ...)` runs only after declared routes — fine, but methods other than GET on unknown /api paths also fall through correctly; worth adding an explicit method allowlist comment.
Waitlist.jsx: client-side regex isEmail is permissive (e.g. 'a@b.c' passes); server-side Zod email validation is the source of truth, which is correct.
i18n.jsx: `setLang` accepts any string; consider validating against SUPPORTED before persisting.

Footer.jsx: 'Built for Rwanda · Made with care' is present (not 'Made with Emergent') so it is fine, but main agent should be aware the substring 'Made with' exists if any future regex check is stricter.
seed_data_creation: Test waitlist entries are inserted with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up by an autouse pytest fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend runs as supervisor program 'backend-node' on port 8001 (Python 'backend' is intentionally FATAL — do NOT restart). Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Google Sheets is not configured -> sheets_status='skipped' is expected. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_parcela_api.py covers all current API contracts and includes Mongo persistence checks via pymongo (localhost:27017, db 'parcela', collection 'waitlist'). All 11 backend + all frontend flows currently green.
